Defines a vibration pattern with a long pulse of 500ms duration and 100 strength, repeating every 1000ms.

# Purpose
This JSON configuration file defines a vibration pattern for a device. The `comments` field provides a description of the pattern as "Standard (Long Pulse) - High." The `notes` array contains an object with the `id` of `long_pulse`, specifying a `vibe_duration_ms` of 500 milliseconds, a `brake_duration_ms` of 0 milliseconds, and a `strength` of 100. The `pattern` field lists the sequence of vibrations, in this case, a single `long_pulse`. The `repeat_delay_ms` field sets a delay of 1000 milliseconds between repetitions of the pattern.
